title: 2pk Home LED 7 Color Changing Mood Lamp Ambiance Light Home Decor
description:
Add some colorful ambiance to your home with the Universal Home Color Changing LED Light! This light features a bright LED that cycles through 7 different colors, creating a warm and inviting environment. It stands about 5" tall and the base is 3" wide, making it the perfect size for an end table, coffee table or bookshelf. The base comes with 4 foam grips to keep the light in place. It can even double as a nightlight for young children. This is a great addition to any living room, kitchen, den or bedroom!
